summary: Iteration 3 e2e testing of Gospel Roots Lawn Care. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed — 5 new tests added for PATCH /api/quotes/{id} (auth-gated, valid transitions persist via GET, invalid status returns 422, unknown id returns 404, default status='new' visible in GET /api/quotes). Frontend: 27/27 Playwright assertions passed across desktop & mobile viewports — seasonal banner shows with data-testid='seasonal-banner' and dismiss persists in localStorage key 'grlc_banner_dismissed_v1' across reload; hero '24 hours' promise badge with data-testid='hero-promise' renders; Areas We Serve section renders with 12 area chips (Gilmer, Big Sandy, Gladewater, Longview, Diana, Pittsburg, Ore City, Hawkins, White Oak, Mineola, Hallsville, Lone Star) and navbar 'Areas' link scrolls into view; /blog renders 4 articles and clicking blog-card-best-mowing-height-east-texas-summer opens /blog/best-mowing-height-east-texas-summer with full body, back link returns to /blog, CTA href='/#contact'; mobile sticky CTA hidden on desktop but visible at 390x844 with quote + tel:+19034245931; nav-mobile-call (tap-to-call) visible on mobile with correct tel href; admin login → /admin lists status chips (all/new/contacted/quoted/won/lost), per-quote dropdown updates status via PATCH (verified backend persistence), filter chip 'won' narrows list to only won quotes, delete still works.
action_items: (Carried over from iter 2, optional) Replace deprecated @app.on_event handlers with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
(Optional) Move CORSMiddleware registration above api_router include for clarity.

(Low priority) /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references httpOnly cookies in its 'Notes' section — stale since the SPA uses Bearer tokens via Authorization header (CORS allow_credentials=False).

(Housekeeping) Pre-existing 'TEST Playwright User' and 'Test User' rows were observed in the quotes inbox (left over from earlier iterations) — main agent or next testing agent may want to clean them up.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/quotes/{id} validates status via Pydantic regex pattern '^(new|contacted|quoted|won|lost)$' → invalid values correctly return 422 without reaching Mongo.
QuoteRequest model now has status: str = 'new', and the response model correctly excludes _id via {'_id': 0} projection in list_quotes/update_quote_status.
update_quote_status uses Mongo $set then re-reads the document and falls back to status='new' (doc.setdefault) — handles legacy docs that predate the status field gracefully.
AdminQuotes.jsx handleStatusChange uses optimistic local update by replacing the row with PATCH response, and selected detail is kept in sync — no extra GET needed. Toast messages on success/failure.
SeasonalBanner uses try/catch around localStorage to survive private-browsing/storage-disabled environments. Dismiss key 'grlc_banner_dismissed_v1' is namespaced and versioned.
MobileStickyCTA uses `lg:hidden` (mounts in DOM but display:none on lg+); blog pages reuse it so the CTA appears on /blog and /blog/:slug too — consistent UX.
BlogPost uses <Navigate to='/blog' replace /> for unknown slugs — proper SPA fallback rather than blank page.
Navbar.route flag distinguishes router <Link> (Blog) from anchor links (#sections) and rewrites href when not on '/' so anchors still resolve to home sections — correct behavior verified.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed quotes during pytest (cleaned up via test_delete_quote_with_admin_and_cleanup) and 2 admin-flow quotes during Playwright (TEST_AdminFlowA deleted via API, TEST_AdminFlowB deleted via UI). All seed data created in iter 3 cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://gospel-lawn-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend URL: https://9bdfa1a4-cff7-488f-81d0-2be2d666244b.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth = Bearer token in localStorage key 'grlc_admin_token' (no cookies). New endpoint: PATCH /api/quotes/{id} body={status} where status ∈ {new,contacted,quoted,won,lost}; admin-only; returns updated quote. Key new data-testids: seasonal-banner, banner-dismiss, banner-cta, hero-promise, areas-section, areas-list, area-{slug}, mobile-sticky-cta, mobile-sticky-quote, mobile-sticky-call, nav-mobile-call, nav-link-areas, nav-link-blog, blog-page, blog-grid, blog-card-{slug}, blog-post-{slug}, blog-back-link, blog-cta-quote, admin-filter-{all|new|contacted|quoted|won|lost}, admin-status-control, admin-status-select, status-badge-{status}. localStorage banner key: 'grlc_banner_dismissed_v1'. Two pre-existing non-TEST_-prefixed (and one TEST_-prefixed but not from this run) quote rows are still in the inbox from prior iterations — not blocking.
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration. All 12 review_request items verified end-to-end (backend + frontend, desktop + mobile).
